mapper.select: SELECT * FROM volunteer_address WHERE id = #{id} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO volunteer_address (volunteer_id, contact_name, contact_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, label, is_default, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{volunteerId}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{label}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer_address SET contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, label = #{label}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM volunteer_address WHERE id = #{id} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
UPDATE volunteer_address SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
